label: 1504 CE
era_summary: Year 1504 (MDIV) was a leap year starting on Monday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1504: Spain-France (Naples), 1502-04. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1504: Spain-France (Naples), 1502-04; Spain-Arawaks (Hispaniola), 1503-04; Spain-Mers-el-Kebir, Oran, Tripoli, etc, 1503-05. Maddison records GDP/capita 1235 (ESP, 1504) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
